title: BAND-MAID YouTube Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of BAND-MAID on YouTube.

questions.question: Which of these BAND-MAID videos had the most views yesterday on YouTube?
questions.explanation:
BAND-MAID / Thrill (スリル)  (Official Music Video) — Views: 23,312,884 | Yesterday: 3,101
BAND-MAID / What is justice? (Official Music Video) TVアニメ「桃源暗鬼」エンディング主題歌 — Views: 3,122,077 | Yesterday: 2,473
BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Music Video) — Views: 2,490,618 | Yesterday: 1,194

choices.text: BAND-MAID with The Warning / SHOW THEM (Official Music Video)
BAND-MAID / What is justice? (Official Music Video) TVアニメ「桃源暗鬼」エンディング主題歌
